name: Plush Blanket with Soft Toy - Cloud Island™ Dinosaur
description: Wrap your little peanut in cute, cozy comfort with this Plush Blanket with Soft Toy from cloud island™. Made from oh-so-soft plush fabric, this blanket offers them warm comfort they'll love to snuggle up with. Designed in a solid hue for easy coordination with their crib sheets, mattress and other nursery decor, this plush blanket comes with a cute 14-inch dinosaur toy that's sure to become their favorite companion during naps, stroller rides or trips in the car. This blanket and toy combo makes a great gift for baby showers, a baby's first birthday, or any other special occasion.cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
